en.extract:
The mountain illadopsis (Illadopsis pyrrhoptera) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found in the Albertine Rift montane forests, Kenya, northern Malawi and western Tanzania. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''mountain illadopsis''' ('''''Illadopsis pyrrhoptera''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Pellorneidae]]. It is found in the [[Albertine Rift montane forests]], [[Kenya]], northern [[Malawi]] and western [[Tanzania]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical dry forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
